subcodes.title: Words spoken on board the SS Celtic at sea, 1912-12-05
subcodes.first_line: One must ride in the ship of God; for this life is a stormy sea, and all the people on earth--that is, over two billion souls--will drown in it before a hundred years have passed.
subcodes.first_line_orig: باید در کشتی الهی سوار شد  زیرا این عالم دریای پر انقلاب است جمیع خلق روی زمین که بیش از دو ملیاردند
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @predictions and prophecies, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
